name: Cardio Machine Exercise
shortDescription: Any sustained aerobic activity using a cardio machine to increase heart rate and endurance.
instructions: Select an appropriate cardio machine, adjust resistance and settings for your fitness level, and perform steady-state or interval training maintaining proper form. Focus on continuous movement and controlled breathing for the session.
steps: Choose your preferred cardio machine (treadmill, bike, etc).
Adjust resistance, incline, and settings as desired.
Perform cardio at steady or variable intensity.
breathing: Breathe rhythmically according to intensity; exhale during exertion, inhale during recovery.
